\tzpentry{ID3668}{Stress-Energy Tensor}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3668 introduces Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{\int_{-\infty}^t \langle T_{\mu\nu}(\tau)\rangle e^{-(t-\tau)/\tau_{\text{dec}}} d\tau}{\sqrt{\int_{-\infty}^t \langle \Delta T_{\mu\nu}^2(\tau)\rangle e^{-2(t-\tau)/\tau_{\text{dec}}} d\tau}} > \mathcal{N}_{\text{crit}} \end{equation}
